{#- Injects per-page JSON-LD (TechArticle + BreadcrumbList) into the of every doc page rendered by Furo. The landing page at `/` uses a separate standalone template (``_templates/index.html`` via ``html_additional_pages``) and is unaffected. `pageurl` is populated by Sphinx only when `html_baseurl` is set in conf.py — the ``{% if pageurl %}`` guard keeps dev builds without a base URL safe. IDs ``#website``/``#software``/``#org`` reference the graph nodes defined in the landing-page JSON-LD, linking this page into the same semantic graph. -#} {% extends "!page.html" %} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {%- if pageurl %} {%- endif %} {% endblock %}
